info.title: LogRhythm SIEM API
info.description: LogRhythm SIEM REST API (now part of Exabeam). Provides endpoints for administration, alarm management, case management, AI Engine rules, search, and metrics. Covers the Admin Service, Alarm, Case, AIE Drill Down, AI Engine, Search, Metrics, and Network Monitor APIs.

get.summary: Returns list details based on the list type
get.description: Returns list details based on the list type

get.summary: Get alarm details using filter criteria
get.description: Get alarm details using filter criteria

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Obtain token via LogRhythm web console.
